title: Nasdaq (NDAQ) Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Nasdaq (NDAQ) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.71 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.67 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.68 per share a year ago.

title: Nasdaq supported by rising demand for anti-financial crime solutions
text: Nasdaq Inc reported a solid jump in third quarter revenue, drievn by demand for anti-financial crime products, and a marked improvement in free cash flow. The financial services company said third quarter net revenues increased 6% to $940 million from the year prior with Solutions Businesses revenue up 9%, with organic growth of 8%.

title: Delisting of Securities of Humanigen, Inc.; Vinco Ventures, Inc.; Liquid Media Group Ltd.; Republic First Bancorp, Inc.; G Medical Innovations Holdings Ltd.
text: NEW YORK, Oct. 11, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Nasdaq Stock Market announced today that it will delist the common stock of Humanigen, Inc. Humanigen, Inc.'s securities were suspended on July 26, 2023, and have not traded on Nasdaq since that time.
